note: sp_inject_freqs.py produces a byte-identical GGUF plus a 128-byte .sp_freq_factors.bin sidecar (32 × fp32). The current shannon-prime-llama integration in D:/F/llama-cpp-sp does not yet consume the sidecar at inference, so injection has zero effect on PPL in this measurement — consistent with the 'GGUF weight compression is still theoretical' memory note. The ship-path KV compression layered on top still hits spec (+0.50% PPL @ 3.4-3.8x).
